close_reason: pydeps-gen implemented in Rust, supports pyproject.toml and requirements.txt
description:
Generate python-deps.toml from pyproject.toml or requirements.txt.

This tool completes the Python dependency management story for turnkey, matching the existing godeps-gen and rustdeps-gen patterns.

Key features:
- Parse pyproject.toml (PEP 621) and requirements.txt
- Query PyPI API for package metadata
- Prefetch packages with nix-prefetch-url --unpack
- Generate python-deps.toml with SRI hashes

References:
- Existing python-deps-cell.nix (already working)
- examples/python-hello-deps (working example with 'six')
- godeps-gen and rustdeps-gen patterns
title: Implement pydeps-gen tool
